summary: validate-secrets.sh is solid (shebang, set -euo pipefail, error handling, jq logic). Workflow has critical issues: workflow_dispatch inputs (warning_days, format) defined but never used via ${{ github.event.inputs.* }} (dead code). Test harness run-act-tests.sh hardcodes 'ok 22 actionlint passes on workflow file' (brittle—breaks if test count changes). Workflow references fixtures/secrets-*.json and tests/validate-secrets.bats that aren't provided, making deliverable incomplete. No date format validation in validate-secrets.sh before passing to date -d. Matrix strategy could replace three near-identical fixture test steps (lines ~30-50 in workflow). Would not ship.
